# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notification Workflow

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, edited]
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - 'release/**'

env:
  PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
  PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  PR_AUTHOR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
  PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}

jobs:
  extract-pr-info:
    name: Extract PR Information
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      pr_title: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}
      pr_description: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_description }}
      pr_number: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}
      pr_author: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_author }}
      pr_labels: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_labels }}
      pr_branch: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_branch }}
      pr_base_branch: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_base_branch }}
      commit_message: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.commit_message }}
      release_note_entry: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.release_note_entry }}
    steps:
      - name: Extract PR Details
        id: pr-info
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const pr = context.payload.pull_request;
            const title = pr.title || '';
            const description = pr.body || 'No description provided';
            const number = pr.number;
            const author = pr.user.login;
            const labels = pr.labels.map(l => l.name).join(', ');
            const branch = pr.head.ref;
            const baseBranch = pr.base.ref;

            // Build a commit message incorporating PR title
            const commitMessage = `[PR #${number}] ${title}`;

            // Build a release note entry
            const releaseNoteEntry = `- ${title} (#${number}) by @${author}`;

            // Sanitize description for output (remove newlines for GitHub output)
            const sanitizedDescription = description.replace(/\r?\n/g, '\\n').replace(/"/g, '\\"');

            core.setOutput('pr_title', title);
            core.setOutput('pr_description', sanitizedDescription);
            core.setOutput('pr_number', number.toString());
            core.setOutput('pr_author', author);
            core.setOutput('pr_labels', labels);
            core.setOutput('pr_branch', branch);
            core.setOutput('pr_base_branch', baseBranch);
            core.setOutput('commit_message', commitMessage);
            core.setOutput('release_note_entry', releaseNoteEntry);

            console.log(`PR #${number}: ${title}`);
            console.log(`Author: ${author}`);
            console.log(`Labels: ${labels}`);
            console.log(`Branch: ${branch} -> ${baseBranch}`);

      - name: Display PR Summary
        run: |
          echo "## PR Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Field | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|-------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **PR Number** | #${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_number }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Title** | ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_title }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Author** | @${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_author }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Labels** | ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_labels }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Branch** | ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_branch }} → ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_base_branch }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Commit Message** | ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.commit_message }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Release Note Entry" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "\`${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.release_note_entry }}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

  build:
    name: "Build: ${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}"
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: extract-pr-info
    outputs:
      build_status: ${{ steps.build-step.outputs.status }}
      build_version: ${{ steps.build-step.outputs.version }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}

      - name: Tag Build with PR Info
        run: |
          echo "Building for: ${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.commit_message }}"
          echo "Feature branch: ${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_branch }}"

          # Create a build info file for tracking
          mkdir -p build-info
          cat > build-info/pr-metadata.json << 'METADATA'
          {
            "pr_number": ${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }},
            "pr_title": "${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}",
            "pr_author": "${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_author }}",
            "pr_branch": "${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_branch }}",
            "pr_base_branch": "${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_base_branch }}",
            "pr_labels": "${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_labels }}",
            "build_sha": "${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}",
            "build_timestamp": "${{ github.event.pull_request.updated_at }}",
            "commit_message": "${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.commit_message }}",
            "release_note_entry": "${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.release_note_entry }}"
          }
          METADATA

          cat build-info/pr-metadata.json

      - name: Run Build
        id: build-step
        run: |
          echo "Running build for PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}..."

          # Generate a version based on PR info
          SHORT_SHA=$(echo "${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}" | cut -c1-7)
          BUILD_VERSION="pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}-${SHORT_SHA}"

          echo "Build version: ${BUILD_VERSION}"
          echo "version=${BUILD_VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          # Simulate build steps - replace with actual build commands
          echo "Installing dependencies..."
          echo "Compiling..."
          echo "Running unit tests..."

          echo "status=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Build completed successfully"

      - name: Upload Build Artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: "build-pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}"
          path: build-info/
          retention-days: 30

  test:
    name: "Test: ${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}"
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [extract-pr-info, build]
    outputs:
      test_status: ${{ steps.test-step.outputs.status }}
      test_results: ${{ steps.test-step.outputs.results }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}

      - name: Run Tests
        id: test-step
        run: |
          echo "Running tests for: ${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.commit_message }}"

          # Replace with actual test commands
          echo "Running integration tests..."
          echo "Running linting..."
          echo "Running security scan..."

          echo "status=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "results=All tests passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

  update-release-notes:
    name: Update Release Notes Draft
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [extract-pr-info, build, test]
    if: needs.build.outputs.build_status == 'success' && needs.test.outputs.test_status == 'success'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Append to Release Notes Draft
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const prTitle = `${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}`;
            const prNumber = `${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}`;
            const prAuthor = `${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_author }}`;
            const prLabels = `${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_labels }}`;
            const releaseEntry = `${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.release_note_entry }}`;

            // Categorize based on PR labels or title prefix
            let category = 'Other Changes';
            const labelsLower = prLabels.toLowerCase();
            const titleLower = prTitle.toLowerCase();

            if (labelsLower.includes('feature') || titleLower.startsWith('feat')) {
              category = 'Features';
            } else if (labelsLower.includes('bug') || titleLower.startsWith('fix')) {
              category = 'Bug Fixes';
            } else if (labelsLower.includes('docs') || titleLower.startsWith('docs')) {
              category = 'Documentation';
            } else if (labelsLower.includes('refactor') || titleLower.startsWith('refactor')) {
              category = 'Refactoring';
            } else if (labelsLower.includes('performance') || titleLower.startsWith('perf')) {
              category = 'Performance Improvements';
            } else if (labelsLower.includes('breaking') || titleLower.includes('breaking')) {
              category = 'Breaking Changes';
            }

            console.log(`Category: ${category}`);
            console.log(`Release Entry: ${releaseEntry}`);

            // Find existing draft release or create one
            const { data: releases } = await github.rest.repos.listReleases({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
            });

            let draftRelease = releases.find(r => r.draft === true);

            const newEntry = `\n### ${category}\n${releaseEntry}\n`;

            if (draftRelease) {
              // Check if this PR is already in the release notes
              const currentBody = draftRelease.body || '';
              if (!currentBody.includes(`(#${prNumber})`)) {
                // Append the new entry
                const updatedBody = currentBody + newEntry;
                await github.rest.repos.updateRelease({
                  owner: context.repo.owner,
                  repo: context.repo.repo,
                  release_id: draftRelease.id,
                  body: updatedBody,
                });
                console.log('Updated existing draft release with new entry');
              } else {
                console.log('PR already exists in release notes, skipping');
              }
            } else {
              console.log('No draft release found. Creating release notes artifact instead.');
            }

      - name: Save Release Note Entry as Artifact
        run: |
          mkdir -p release-notes
          echo "${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.release_note_entry }}" >> release-notes/pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}.md
          echo "" >> release-notes/pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}.md
          echo "**Description:**" >> release-notes/pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}.md
          echo "${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_description }}" | sed 's/\\n/\n/g' >> release-notes/pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}.md

      - name: Upload Release Notes Entry
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: "release-note-pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}"
          path: release-notes/
          retention-days: 90

  notify:
    name: Send Build Notifications
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [extract-pr-info, build, test]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Determine Overall Status
        id: status
        run: |
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}"
          TEST_STATUS="${{ needs.test.outputs.test_status }}"

          if [[ "$BUILD_STATUS" == "success" && "$TEST_STATUS" == "success" ]]; then
            echo "overall=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "emoji=✅" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "color=good" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          elif [[ "$BUILD_STATUS" == "failure" || "$TEST_STATUS" == "failure" ]]; then
            echo "overall=failure" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "emoji=❌" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "color=danger" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "overall=cancelled" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "emoji=⚠️" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "color=warning" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Post PR Comment with Build Status
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const prNumber = parseInt('${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}');
            const prTitle = `${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}`;
            const buildStatus = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}' || 'unknown';
            const testStatus = '${{ needs.test.outputs.test_status }}' || 'unknown';
            const buildVersion = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}' || 'N/A';
            const overallStatus = '${{ steps.status.outputs.overall }}';
            const emoji = '${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }}';
            const commitMessage = `${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.commit_message }}`;
            const releaseEntry = `${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.release_note_entry }}`;
            const runUrl = `${context.serverUrl}/${context.repo.owner}/${context.repo.repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId}`;

            const statusEmoji = (s) => s === 'success' ? '✅' : s === 'failure' ? '❌' : '⚠️';

            const body = `## ${emoji} Build Notification for PR #${prNumber}

            **Feature:** ${prTitle}
            **Commit Message:** \`${commitMessage}\`
            **Build Version:** \`${buildVersion}\`

            ### Pipeline Results

            | Stage | Status |
            |-------|--------|
            | Build | ${statusEmoji(buildStatus)} ${buildStatus} |
            | Tests | ${statusEmoji(testStatus)} ${testStatus} |
            | **Overall** | **${emoji} ${overallStatus}** |

            ### Release Notes Entry
            > ${releaseEntry}

            ---
            📋 [View Full Pipeline Run](${runUrl})
            🕐 ${new Date().toISOString()}`;

            // Find and update existing bot comment or create new one
            const { data: comments } = await github.rest.issues.listComments({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: prNumber,
            });

            const botComment = comments.find(
              c => c.user.type === 'Bot' && c.body.includes('Build Notification for PR')
            );

            if (botComment) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                comment_id: botComment.id,
                body: body,
              });
              console.log('Updated existing build notification comment');
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: prNumber,
                body: body,
              });
              console.log('Created new build notification comment');
            }

      - name: Notify Slack
        if: env.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          PR_TITLE="${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}"
          PR_NUMBER="${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}"
          PR_AUTHOR="${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_author }}"
          COMMIT_MSG="${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.commit_message }}"
          RELEASE_ENTRY="${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.release_note_entry }}"
          BUILD_VERSION="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          OVERALL_STATUS="${{ steps.status.outputs.overall }}"
          STATUS_EMOJI="${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }}"
          STATUS_COLOR="${{ steps.status.outputs.color }}"
          RUN_URL="${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          PR_URL="${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}"

          curl -X POST "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -d @- << EOF
          {
            "text": "${STATUS_EMOJI} Build ${OVERALL_STATUS} for PR #${PR_NUMBER}: ${PR_TITLE}",
            "attachments": [
              {
                "color": "${STATUS_COLOR}",
                "blocks": [
                  {
                    "type": "header",
                    "text": {
                      "type": "plain_text",
                      "text": "${STATUS_EMOJI} PR Build Notification"
                    }
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "section",
                    "fields": [
                      {
                        "type": "mrkdwn",
                        "text": "*Feature:*\n<${PR_URL}|#${PR_NUMBER}: ${PR_TITLE}>"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "mrkdwn",
                        "text": "*Author:*\n@${PR_AUTHOR}"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "mrkdwn",
                        "text": "*Build Version:*\n\`${BUILD_VERSION}\`"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "mrkdwn",
                        "text": "*Status:*\n${STATUS_EMOJI} ${OVERALL_STATUS}"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "section",
                    "text": {
                      "type": "mrkdwn",
                      "text": "*Commit Message:* \`${COMMIT_MSG}\`\n*Release Note:* ${RELEASE_ENTRY}"
                    }
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "actions",
                    "elements": [
                      {
                        "type": "button",
                        "text": {
                          "type": "plain_text",
                          "text": "View PR"
                        },
                        "url": "${PR_URL}"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "button",
                        "text": {
                          "type": "plain_text",
                          "text": "View Pipeline"
                        },
                        "url": "${RUN_URL}"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
          EOF

          echo "Slack notification sent"

      - name: Notify Microsoft Teams
        if: env.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          PR_TITLE="${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}"
          PR_NUMBER="${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}"
          PR_AUTHOR="${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_author }}"
          COMMIT_MSG="${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.commit_message }}"
          RELEASE_ENTRY="${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.release_note_entry }}"
          BUILD_VERSION="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          OVERALL_STATUS="${{ steps.status.outputs.overall }}"
          STATUS_EMOJI="${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }}"
          RUN_URL="${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          PR_URL="${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}"

          if [[ "$OVERALL_STATUS" == "success" ]]; then
            THEME_COLOR="00FF00"
          elif [[ "$OVERALL_STATUS" == "failure" ]]; then
            THEME_COLOR="FF0000"
          else
            THEME_COLOR="FFFF00"
          fi

          curl -X POST "$TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -d @- << EOF
          {
            "@type": "MessageCard",
            "themeColor": "${THEME_COLOR}",
            "summary": "Build ${OVERALL_STATUS} for PR #${PR_NUMBER}",
            "sections": [
              {
                "activityTitle": "${STATUS_EMOJI} Build ${OVERALL_STATUS}: PR #${PR_NUMBER}",
                "activitySubtitle": "${PR_TITLE}",
                "facts": [
                  { "name": "Author", "value": "@${PR_AUTHOR}" },
                  { "name": "Commit Message", "value": "${COMMIT_MSG}" },
                  { "name": "Build Version", "value": "${BUILD_VERSION}" },
                  { "name": "Release Note", "value": "${RELEASE_ENTRY}" },
                  { "name": "Status", "value": "${STATUS_EMOJI} ${OVERALL_STATUS}" }
                ]
              }
            ],
            "potentialAction": [
              {
                "@type": "OpenUri",
                "name": "View Pull Request",
                "targets": [{ "os": "default", "uri": "${PR_URL}" }]
              },
              {
                "@type": "OpenUri",
                "name": "View Pipeline",
                "targets": [{ "os": "default", "uri": "${RUN_URL}" }]
              }
            ]
          }
          EOF

          echo "Teams notification sent"

      - name: Generate Notification Summary
        run: |
          echo "## Notification Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Build Details" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Feature:** ${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **PR:** #${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Author:** @${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.pr_author }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Commit Message:** \`${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.commit_message }}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Build Version:** \`${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Overall Status:** ${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }} ${{ steps.status.outputs.overall }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Release Notes Entry" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "> ${{ needs.extract-pr-info.outputs.release_note_entry }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Notifications Sent" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- ✅ GitHub PR Comment" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          if [[ -n "${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}" ]]; then
            echo "- ✅ Slack" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          else
            echo "- ⏭️ Slack (not configured)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi
          if [[ -n "${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}" ]]; then
            echo "- ✅ Microsoft Teams" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          else
            echo "- ⏭️ Microsoft Teams (not configured)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi
